Corrected total_population, households, average_household_size, and median_age to align with US Census 2000 data for the corresponding geographic area (formerly Tract 24.12). Original values were: Pop 10500, HH 3450, Avg HH Size 3.0, Median Age 34.8.
Median age jump seems unusually high for one year; likely an artifact of interpolation. Other values are plausible for continued growth.
